Risk: Permit or STR eligibility issue delays launch
Mitigation: Complete legal research checklist and verify official sources

Risk: Cleaning turnover inconsistency impacts guest reviews
Mitigation: Use turnover quick checklist every stay and verify with photos

Risk: Over-discounting reduces margin without occupancy gain
Mitigation: Apply 15 percent cap and weekly pricing review cadence

Risk: Unexpected repair issue causes guest disruption
Mitigation: Run monthly maintenance quick pass and keep reserve budget

Risk: Slow booking pace in first 45 days
Mitigation: Use launch promo stack and optimize listing/photo quality
Notes: Escalate with controlled weekday rate adjustments
